{{Event Header|StS2_Wellspring.png}} {{E|Wellspring|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Overgrowth}}. == Options == {{Frame|Bottle}} {{TS|positive||Procure 1 random {{2|Potions|Potion}}.}}
{{Frame|Bathe}} {{TS|positive||Remove 1 card from Deck.}} {{TS|negative||Add 1 {{C|Guilty||2}} (curse) to Deck.}} == Dialogue ==
You trace a low rumble to its source and find yourself captivated by a tranquil wellspring. The water is an emerald green with clusters of glowing motes. It looks inviting. What can possibly go wrong?
{{Frame|Bottle}}
Bathing in the beautiful water seems suspicious... you decide to bottle some up instead. This will come in handy.
{{Frame|Bathe}}
You emerge from the pool with a slight feeling of unease. However, you feel surprisingly refreshed.
